bottom_line: Default step-level behavioural pytest runs to PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--no-cov in prompts/skills to avoid repeated false failures from global coverage gating.
coverage_notes: Read all S01..S14 and S18 raw logs in full (small files). For larger QV logs: sampled heads/tails and grep-only triage for S15 (429KB), S16 (443KB), S17 (85KB). Cross-checked DB telemetry via `uv run iw item-status F-00089 --json` and active step reports for branch-specific confirmations.

findings.title: Step-level pytest command conflicts with repository coverage fail-under gate
findings.recommendation: Update implementation prompt + testing skill to explicitly permit `PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--no-cov` for per-file RED/GREEN verification when global coverage gates are known to fail targeted runs.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S01_run1.log:23 — 'Required verification command `uv run pytest tests/integration/daemon_chaos/ -v` fails at repository-wide coverage fail-under=50% for narrow subset runs, even when assertions pass.'
ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S03_run2.log:21 — 'required command runs all 5 tests green, but exits non-zero ... coverage fail-under=50'
ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S04_run2.log:19 — 'required verification command ... fails after tests pass because repository-wide coverage fail_under=50'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Clarify workflow implementation prompts and iw-ai-core-testing skill to allow PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--no-cov for per-file behavioural RED/GREEN runs when repository-wide coverage fail-under causes false failures; analyzed in F-00089 (ai-dev/work/F-00089/reports/F-00089_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: CodeReview scope handling caused repeated fail/fix thrash on out-of-scope diffs
findings.recommendation: Adjust review/fix-cycle routing to pre-filter or separately classify pre-existing out-of-scope diffs vs item-attributable diffs so review steps fail only on actionable in-scope findings.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S09_run5.log:4 — 'step-fail ... reason "scope diff vs main not empty ..."'
ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S09_fix2.log:39 — 'Please amend allowed paths ... if you want this critical finding resolved in this fix cycle.'
ai-dev/logs/F-00089_S10_run9.log:8 — 'step-fail ... reason "... production-scope diff not empty"'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Improve code-review/fix-cycle scope filtering so pre-existing out-of-scope diffs do not trigger repeated failed review loops for item-local work; analyzed in F-00089 (ai-dev/work/F-00089/reports/F-00089_self_assess_report.md).
